description: Use this API to set the definition of an owner subsystem. This can be used to toggle a particular owner subsystem on or off. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = osysdef(sid, defined)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid owner subsystem id. valid owner subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: defined
parameters.description: Flag to mark the owner subsystem as undefined/defined. (input).

defined.description: mark the owner subsystem as undefined.
mark the owner subsystem as defined.
